argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const limit = {{ limit }} || 20; const ct0 = document.cookie.split(';').map(c=>c.trim()).find(c=>c.startsWith('ct0='))?.split('=')[1]; if (!ct0) return { error: 'Not logged into x.com (no ct0 cookie)' }; await new Promise(r => { const start = Date.now(); const poll = () => { const cells = document.querySelectorAll('[data-testid="trend"]'); if (cells.length > 0) return r(); if (Date.now() - start > 8000) return r(); setTimeout(poll, 500); }; poll(); }); const items = []; const cells = document.querySelectorAll('[data-testid="trend"]'); cells.forEach((cell) => { if (items.length >= limit) return; const text = cell.textContent || ''; if (text.includes('Promoted')) return; const container = cell.querySelector(':scope > div'); if (!container) return; const divs = container.children; if (divs.length < 2) return; const topic = divs[1].textContent.trim(); if (!topic) return; const catText = divs[0].textContent.trim(); const category = catText.replace(/^\d+\s*/, '').replace(new RegExp('^\\xB7\\s*'), '').trim(); items.push({ rank: items.length + 1, topic, category }); }); return { results: items }; }
async (intermediate) => { if (intermediate.error) return [{ rank: 0, topic: '', category: '', error: intermediate.error }]; return intermediate.results || []; }
